---
title: "About Me"
---

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; gap:28px; align-items:flex-start; margin-top:10px; margin-bottom:18px;">

  <div style="flex:0 0 58%; max-width:58%;">
    <img src="ME.JPEG" alt="Ran Xin Jiang headshot" style="width:100%; border-radius:6px;">
  </div>

  <div style="flex:1; max-width:42%;">
    <div style="font-size:1.6rem; font-weight:700; line-height:1.15;">
      Ran Xin Jiang <span style="font-size:1rem; font-weight:400; font-style:italic;">(she/her)</span>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-top:6px; font-style:italic;">
      (pronounced "ran-sing")
    </div>

    <div style="margin-top:14px;">
      <div style="font-weight:700;">M.S. Information Systems (Data Analytics)</div>
      <div>Baruch College, Zicklin School of Business</div>
      <div>Expected Graduation: August 2026</div>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-top:12px;">
      <div style="font-weight:700;">B.S. Information Technology &amp; Management</div>
      <div>University at Buffalo</div>
      <div>Graduated: May 2024</div>
    </div>

    <hr style="margin:14px 0;">

    <div style="font-weight:700; margin-bottom:6px;">Let's Connect</div>
    <div>📧 <a href="mailto:ranxinjiang@gmail.com">ranxinjiang@gmail.com</a></div>
    <div>🔗 <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ranxin-jiang/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a></div>
    <div>💻 <a href="https://github.com/rxjiang12" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a></div>
  </div>

</div>
```

Hi, my name is Ran Xin Jiang (ran-sing), and I am a first-generation college student currently pursuing a Master’s degree in Information Systems with a concentration in Data Analytics at Baruch College’s Zicklin School of Business. I recently graduated from the University at Buffalo with a Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology & Management.

Through my academic and professional experiences, I have worked on projects involving data analysis, systems implementation, and technology-driven process improvement. My internship experience includes supporting the migration of over 100 LMS training courses at MJHS Health System, analyzing platform usage gaps at Houghton Mifflin Harcourt, and contributing to project planning initiatives at Blackstone LaunchPad.

I’ve always been drawn to opportunities that allow me to learn by doing and to be involved in projects where I can see the real-world impact of my work. I enjoy environments where I’m able to work closely with others to figure out how things can be improved, whether that means helping organize information more clearly, streamlining a process, or supporting the implementation of a new system. 

I also tend to enjoy being involved throughout the lifecycle of a project, from planning through execution, and value opportunities where I can take an active role in helping ideas turn into something that can actually be used.

Outside of school and work, I enjoy exploring new food spots around the city, traveling, and staying active through pilates. I also enjoy trying new activities in my free time, and recently have been getting into pickleball, rock climbing, and hiking.

I am currently seeking full-time opportunities beginning in August 2026 where I can continue developing my experience in analytics, technology operations, and process improvement within organizational environments.
